Aliyun OSS region part of the bucket. Fo: Bagian wilayah Aliyun OSS dari bucket. Contoh: "oss-cn-beijing".
Base URL for file access, could be your: URL dasar untuk akses file, bisa jadi URL dasar CDN Anda. Contoh: "https://cdn.nocobase.com".
Default storage will be used when not se: Penyimpanan default akan digunakan jika tidak dipilih
Files are only removed when their corres: Files are only removed when their corresponding records in the file collection are deleted. If a record from another collection includes an associating field referencing the file collection, the file will not be deleted unless cascade deletion is enabled for that association.
Keep file in storage when destroy record: Simpan file di penyimpanan saat menghapus catatan
Keep file in storage when destroy the fi: Keep file in storage when destroy the file record
Multi-types seperated with comma, for ex: Beberapa tipe dipisahkan dengan koma, contoh: "image/*", "image/png", "image/*, application/pdf" dll.
PDF preview failed. Please download the: Pratinjau PDF gagal. Silakan unduh file untuk melihatnya.
PDF preview failed to load the file. If: Pratinjau PDF gagal memuat file. Jika file disimpan di domain lain, konfigurasikan CORS pada penyimpanan eksternal agar situs ini dapat membaca file tersebut.
PDF preview resources failed to load. Pl: Sumber daya pratinjau PDF gagal dimuat. Silakan segarkan halaman dan periksa apakah file statis plugin telah diterapkan dengan benar.
Jalur relatif tempat file akan disimpan. Biarkan kosong sebagai jalur root. Garis miring di awal dan akhir "/" akan diabaikan. Contoh: "user/avatar".
Storage type {{type}} is not registered,: Storage type {{type}} is not registered, please check if related plugin is enabled.
Upload timeout for a single file in mill: Upload timeout for a single file in milliseconds. Default is 600000.
